\tzpentry{ID3528}{Concept Units Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3528 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi(x_1,x_2)=\int_{-\infty}^{\infty}\exp\!\Big[\frac{i}{\hbar}p\,(x_1-x_2+x_0)\Big]\,dp \;=\;\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{\tfrac{i}{\hbar} p (r+x_0)}\,dp , \]
